sub_modules.conv1d_window_next: Combinational shift-register window update that appends the newest sample and drops the oldest sample.
sub_modules.conv1d_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient source for supported fixed kernels, including the 5-tap benchmark kernel [2,8,12,8,2].
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate over the flattened stencil window and coefficient vector.
sub_modules.conv1d_scale: Combinational fixed-point normalization by right shift and truncation to the output width.
